meta.project: NLP Hub - Nha phan phoi nguyen lieu pha che khu Xuan Loc - Long Khanh - Dong Nai
meta.owner_location: TP.HCM (dia gioi hanh chinh moi - sau sap nhap 2025 gom ca Binh Duong, Ba Ria-Vung Tau cu)
meta.business_model: B2B - NPP nguyen lieu cho quan do uong KHU VUC TP.HCM (dia gioi moi)

decisions_made: Chuyen huong tu mo quan nuoc sang lam nha phan phoi nguyen lieu (giam chi phi mat bang, tranh canh tranh quan le)
Dia ban muc tieu: Xuan Loc - Long Khanh - Cam My - Dinh Quan (con thua NPP, quan phai cho ship 1-2 ngay tu Bien Hoa/TPHCM)
Dinh vi: giao trong ngay + giay to ATTP day du + tang cong thuc mon hot hang thang
Co cau ton kho 80% hang VN quay nhanh / 20% hang nhap chon loc
Nguon chu luc de xuat: Gia Thinh Phat; nguon hang nhap: Le Gia/Horecavn; topping: Minh Hanh Food/Gia Uy

2026-07-03: Chu nhan xac nhan dia ban hoat dong la TP.HCM (dia gioi moi) - loi the: gan nguon hang gooc (GTP, Le Gia, Pha Che Viet...) giao trong ngay de dang; thach thuc: canh tranh NPP day dac hon Xuan Loc

canh_bao: MATCHA NHAT TANG GIA KY LUC +170%: Ito En tang gia ban 50-100%; nguon cung khan hiem toan cau; gia nhap pho thong 4-5k/gram, cao cap 15-20k/gram (baodautu, baomoi 11/2025)

>45% doanh nghiep F&B da tang gia ban le de bu chi phi (iPOS) - quan nho rat nhay cam gia, NPP giu gia on dinh se thang

compliance.tra_cuu_ATTP: CANH BAO: nghidinh15.vfa.gov.vn NGUNG HOAT DONG tu 01/04/2025. Kenh moi: (1) congbosanpham.vfa.gov.vn - tra ban cong bo SP nhap khau; (2) vnsw.gov.vn - dich vu cong 1 cua quoc gia; (3) vfa.gov.vn - Cuc ATTP, canh bao co so vi pham; (4) sattp.hochiminhcity.gov.vn - So ATTP TPHCM muc Danh sach co so du dieu kien; (5) Hotline Cuc ATTP: (024) 38464489, phan anh vi pham: 04.32321556
giay_to_can_doi_hang_VN: ban tu cong bo san pham
giay ATTP co so cua nha may
giay_to_can_doi_hang_nhap: NHAN PHU TIENG VIET (bat buoc - khong co = hang troi noi)
phap_ly_cua_minh: dang ky ho kinh doanh nganh ban buon thuc pham
kho: ke cach san/tuong, tu dong hang lanh
luu ho so hoa don + cong bo cua moi nguyen lieu

action_log.action: Hoan thanh nghien cuu thi truong + danh muc nguyen lieu + danh ba NCC + dong goi du an web & agent
action_log.next: Goi hen 3 NCC (GTP 1900299948, P-Taste 0789838858, Linh Dan 0902499377) va len lich 1 chuyen TPHCM

action_log.action: Quet trend thang 7/2026: xac dinh 5 mon viral (tra sua huong hoa, matcha dau phan tang, tra vai hoa hong/cam sa, blended dessert, soda mocktail). Doi dia ban sang TP.HCM (dia gioi moi).
action_log.next: Tru them: syrup hoa hong + hoa que, mut dau Berrino, matcha culinary Nhat, bot khoai mon, syrup viet quat Osterberg, vai Hosen. Bao gia cho khach quan kem cong thuc 5 mon.

action_log.action: Lenh /ncc: tham dinh 5 NCC chu luc (GTP, Le Gia, Pha Che Viet, Minh Hanh, Horecavn) - deu uy tin TOT/KHA. PHAT HIEN QUAN TRONG: cong nghidinh15.vfa.gov.vn NGUNG tu 01/04/2025 -> cap nhat 5 kenh tra cuu moi vao compliance. Da dong bo len web index.html (khoi Tinh trang tham dinh NCC).
action_log.next: Den truc tiep GTP + Le Gia xin ho so phap ly goc (ban cong bo SP, giay ATTP co so). Tra ten cong ty tren congbosanpham.vfa.gov.vn va sattp.hochiminhcity.gov.vn. Chay collector.py hang tuan de theo doi lien tuc.

action_log.action: Quet tuan + tham dinh dot 2 (7 NCC con lai - xong 12/14). PHAT HIEN: (1) Matcha Nhat tang gia +170%, chuoi lon chuyen dan sang matcha TQ; (2) Tra sua CHOM CHOM la hero item Katinat 2026 - nguyen lieu chinh la dac san Xuan Loc/Long Khanh; (3) >45% F&B tang gia ban - quan can NPP giu gia on dinh.
action_log.next: 3 HANH DONG TUAN TOI: (1) NHAP: chot gia matcha 2 dong (Nhat premium + TQ pho thong) TRUOC khi tang tiep + mua chom chom Long Khanh dau vu lam mau chao hang; (2) CHAO QUAN: combo 'Tra sua chom chom Katinat-style' (cong thuc + chom chom ngam + siro vai + tra o long) gia von ~5k/ly; (3) DINH VI: cam ket giu gia 3 thang cho khach ky hop dong quy - danh vao noi dau 45% quan bi tang gia dau vao.

action_log.action: Nang cap web index.html: (1) khoi 'Truy cap nhanh website nha cung ung' - 18 nut bam mo truc tiep trang chinh thuc cua NCC (phan loai: nha san xuat goc / NPP / trai cay / so gia / TMDT); (2) toan bo ten mien NCC trong bang danh ba + footer deu thanh link bam duoc (25 cho); (3) kem 3 link cong tra cuu ATTP moi.
action_log.next: Khi co NCC moi -> them nut vao khoi Truy cap nhanh + hang moi trong bang danh ba + entry trong memory suppliers.

action_log.action: Kiem ke kho thuc te tu anh chup: nhan dien 9 nhom SP dang co (Berrino, Golden Farm squash + socola, BKB kem cheese, Frima 1kg, cacao TRONG DUC Dong Nai - xac nhan gia thuyet nguon dia phuong!, muoi hong, siro Thai). Tra gia thi truong tung mon + NCC goi y. Dong bo len web index (khoi Kho hien tai).
action_log.next: Toi uu chi phi: (1) Frima chuyen tui 1kg -> bao 25kg tiet kiem ~15%; (2) dam phan truc tiep Golden Farm/Vinafruit gia dai ly thay vi mua le; (3) lien he Ca Cao Trong Duc lam nguon doc quyen dia phuong.

action_log.action: Nang cap UI web: (1) bam vao tung dong san pham trong Bang chi tiet + bang Kho hien tai -> bat anh minh hoa to (lightbox) ngay; (2) them hieu ung dong: header gradient chuyen sac, the/carc xuat hien fadeUp so le, anh zoom khi hover, nhan HOT nhap nhay pulse, lightbox zoomIn; (3) icon may anh + con tro zoom-in bao hieu dong bam duoc.
action_log.next: Co the them anh rieng cho tung thuong hieu (Frima, Rhodes, Golden Farm...) neu can catalogue chi tiet hon.

action_log.action: Nang cap thu vien anh da dang: tao 10 anh nguyen lieu rieng (hong tra, oolong, tra lai, khoai mon, cacao, dau tay, viet quat, tra dao, tra vai, ca phe muoi) -> tong 20 anh nhung base64 trong index.html (1.98MB). Logic click moi: moi dong san pham khop bo anh rieng theo tu khoa; bam lan 1 hien anh chinh, bam tiep DOI sang anh khac trong bo (hien so 1/2, 2/3...).
action_log.next: Neu can them anh chom chom/chanh day/bao 25kg thuong hieu that -> tao them phien sau (da het luot tao anh phien nay).

action_log.action: Tao website ban hang shop.html (1 file, 18 anh nhung, 1.49MB) de chia se cho cua hang: hero + 18 the san pham gia tham khao + combo chom chom + 6 cam ket + lien he day du (hotline 0389045248, showroom Binh Thanh, kho Dai Phuoc Nhon Trach). Nut goi/Zalo noi truc tiep, thanh goi mobile, lightbox anh, hieu ung reveal.
action_log.next: Dua shop.html len Netlify/GitHub Pages de co link chia se Zalo cho cac quan.

pending_questions: Muc nhap toi thieu de huong gia NPP tai GTP?
GTP/P-Taste/Linh Dan co cho doc quyen khu vuc Xuan Loc - Long Khanh khong?
Chi phi van chuyen TPHCM -> Xuan Loc ai chiu?
Nguon tran chau konjac it calo o VN da co ai san xuat chua?
Syrup hoa hong/hoa que chinh hang: Le Gia (Monin Rose) hay Golden Farm co vi nay khong - can goi kiem tra gia si?
Voi dia ban TP.HCM moi: nen thue kho khu nao de giao nhanh (Thu Duc? Binh Chanh? Di An cu?)
